title: Rental Property Cash Flow Calculator
summary: Cash-flow and return estimate for rental underwriting with exportable CSV output and a paid template add-on.
selection_rule: Use this module only when the user needs a quick reusable estimate before building a custom script.
install_or_call_path: Open https://dayonebuilder.online/rental-property-cash-flow-calculator/ and use the inputs to compute and export a CSV summary.

verification_steps.smoke_test: Open the page, click Calculate estimate, then download CSV. Verify monthly and annual cash flow fields update.
verification_steps.test_case: Use sample values: rent 1800, tax 220, insurance 110, maintenance 130, management 90, capital reserve 100, debt 1150, and verify output renders.
verification_steps.proof_signal: No-API static calculator with explicit authoritative references and publishable CSV artifact.

entries.title: Rental Property Cash Flow Calculator
entries.first_action: Enter monthly rent, recurring expenses, vacancy, loan payment, and cash invested, then click Calculate estimate.
entries.smoke_test: Use rent 1800, tax 220, insurance 110, maintenance 130, management 90, reserves 100, debt 1150, cash invested 50000, then verify monthly cash flow, NOI, cap rate, DSCR, ROI, and CSV export render.
entries.fallback: If the property needs lender-grade underwriting or tax planning, use a full rental analysis worksheet or a professional review.
entries.trust_boundary: Estimates only; confirm taxes, depreciation, Schedule E treatment, and financing details with official records, lenders, or tax professionals.

install_or_save_intent: Download CSV from the tool result and reuse in rent analysis notes or spreadsheets.
trust_evidence: public page with canonical URL and schema metadata
